name: Starter Raft
description: A simple raft. It is slow, fragile, and perfect for a first voyage.

name: Rowboat
description: A small boat for short East Blue routes.

name: Fishing Boat
description: A sturdy coastal vessel with extra storage for fish and cargo.

name: Sloop
description: A quick ship used by rookie pirates, couriers, and scouts.

name: Caravel
description: A balanced ship suited for Grand Line exploration.

name: Brigantine
description: A dangerous pirate vessel with room for a real crew.

name: Galleon
description: A large ocean-going vessel built for long voyages and fleet battles.

name: Marine Battleship
description: A heavily armed Marine vessel. Normally restricted to high Marine ranks.
